description: Template variables used by the setup wizard to personalize toolkit files. Each variable has a prompt shown to the user during setup, a default value (null = required input), and a list of files where the variable appears.

USER_NAME.description: User's display name — used in encyclopedia headers, journal entries, compiled documents

DRIVE_ROOT.description: Google Drive base path for toolkit data (rclone remote prefix)
DRIVE_ROOT.prompt: Where should Claude store files on your Google Drive? ('Root' just means a top-level folder — one of the first folders you see when you open Drive, not inside any other folder.)

TODOIST_PROJECT.description: Todoist project name for inbox processing
TODOIST_PROJECT.prompt: What Todoist project should Claude use as your inbox?

GIT_REMOTE.description: User's personal git remote for config backup
GIT_REMOTE.prompt: Do you have a GitHub repo for backing up your Claude config? (leave blank to skip)

JOURNAL_DIR.description: Local directory path for journal entries
JOURNAL_DIR.prompt: Where should journal entries be saved locally?

ENCYCLOPEDIA_DIR.description: Local cache directory for encyclopedia modular source files
ENCYCLOPEDIA_DIR.prompt: Where should encyclopedia files be cached locally?
